title: ononis viscosa var. foetida
intro: Ononis viscosa var. foetida, also known as the stinking goosefoot, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa var. foetida include relief from urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
